title: Vellar
description:
Warning: This game contains flashing lights that may trigger seizures in people with photosensitive epilepsy. Player discretion is advised.

Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where reality fractures, memories return in fragments, and recordings tell a story that doesn’t add up. Explore a shifting house and uncover a truth buried deep within a past you may not fully remember.

StoryA family is dead — but the recordings left behind reveal events that don’t match reality. As you explore the house, you will begin to piece together what happened in the days leading up to their deaths… and why certain memories feel disturbingly familiar.

GameplaySearch through distorted rooms, collect items, solve environmental puzzles, and listen to unsettling recordings left behind by the house’s residents. Each tape reveals another fragment of the past, slowly pulling you deeper into a truth that refuses to stay hidden.

ApparitionsYou are not alone. An ancient entity bound by a forgotten ritual still lingers within the house. It watches, reacts, and grows stronger as you uncover recordings from the past — and as your own memories begin to break apart.

Items & InteractionExplore every corner of the house, collect useful items, and interact with your surroundings to uncover hidden clues. Every object may be part of a larger truth — one that connects the house, the recordings, and your own forgotten memories.
description_short: Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where a family is dead… but the recordings they left behind slowly reveal a version of events that doesn’t match reality. Explore a shifting house filled with impossible rooms, distorted corridors, and uncover a truth that refuses to stay buried.
